questionHtml: Outline why the estimate made in (b)(i) is unlikely to be the actual age of the universe.
markschemeHtml:
because estimate assumes the «present» constant rate of expansion ✔
it is unlikely that the expansion rate of the universe was ever constant ✔
there is uncertainty in the value of H0 ✔

NOTE: OWTTE

meta.title: Outline why the estimate made in (b)(i) is unlikely to be the actual age of the universe.
